name: Creole Garlic Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Add garlic cloves to beef broth in a saucepan; cover and simmer for 15 minutes, or until garlic is soft.
2. Remove garlic and reserve it; add water and sherry to the broth and heat to serving temperature.
3. Toast bread on one side under the broiler; remove and spread untoasted side with butter.
4. Mash reserved garlic and spread over bread; sprinkle with cheese.
5. Broil toast until brown and bubbly, about 30 seconds.
6. Place a piece of toasted bread in each of the four soup bowls; ladle hot soup over and serve.
